study_set.name: Molecular basis of anthracnose resistance in sorghum
study_set.description: This study was aimed at identifying the molecular basis of the resistance of select sorghum accessions against the pathogenic fungus Colletotrichum sublineola, the causal agent of anthracnose. An RNA-seq experiment was conducted to monitor changes in gene expression in seedlings during the initial days after infection, relative to mock-inoculated plants.
study_set.title: Molecular basis of anthracnose resistance in sorghum
